title: News and Updates - Clive Lewis
headings: h2: News and Updates from Clive Lewis
h2: Calling on the Government to pause proposals that will open the door to higher NHS drug prices
h2: Letter to Government: Raising my concerns with Palantir’s NHS contract
h2: Meeting with UNISON to discuss Public Ownership of Water
h2: I attended an event in Parliament to hear about the barriers preventing infected blood victims from claiming compensation
h2: Letter to the Chancellor calling for a targeted reduction in VAT for pubs and support to address broader cost pressures facing the sector
h2: I wrote to the Government, calling for action to hold Big Tech to account for fraud occurring on their platforms
h2: Calling on the Government to act against British overseas tax havens
h2: Calling on the Government to condemn the Israeli death penalty law
h2: Calling for a national debate on our digital sovereignty
